Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Deconstruct and Analyze the Input Database Schema order event log orders resources Key relationships Normal Process Flow Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Event Log Data Four cases Reference Data Orders table Resources table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Each Case against the Normal Flow Case 1001 Events Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Matches normal flow perfectly Case 1002 Events Register Order Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Issue Invoice Receive Payment Anomaly 1 Confirm Shipment immediately after Register Order Anomaly 2 Ship Goods before Credit Check and Validate Stock Anomaly 3 Perform Credit Check after shipping Case 1003 Events Register Order Perform Credit Check Ship Goods Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Receive Payment Anomaly 1 Ship Goods before Confirm Shipment Anomaly 3 Validate Stock missing Case 1004 Events Register Order Receive Payment Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Anomaly 1 Receive Payment immediately after registration Anomaly 2 Issue Invoice after payment Anomaly 3 Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock missing

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1002 Hypothesis Priority order might have bypassed checks Or system error Or manual override credit score low but shipped anyway Case 1003 Hypothesis Missing step System bug Or shipped without validation late confirmation Case 1004 Hypothesis Pre payment Or system error Missing checks on standard order Synthesize Anomalies and Hypotheses Hypotheses H1 Priority Bypass H2 System Glitch H3 Human Error Override H4 Missing Validation H5 Invoice Payment Logic

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomaly Categories Out of order execution Case 1002 Case 1003 Missing activities Case 1003 Case 1004 Early Late activities Case 1004 Case 1002 Explicit flags Case 1003 late confirmation Case 1002 attempted early Order Type correlation Case 1002 priority

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Formulate SQL Queries Query 1 Check Process Adherence WITH case activities SELECT case id activity MIN timestamp GROUP BY case id activity ordered activities string agg activity ORDER BY first occurrence Query 2 Missing Activities SELECT case id COUNT DISTINCT activity HAVING COUNT less than 7 Query 3 Payment Timing WITH timings pay time MAX CASE WHEN Receive Payment inv time MAX CASE WHEN Issue Invoice WHERE pay time less than inv time Query 4 Credit Check Timing vs Order Type SELECT case id order type cc time ship time HAVING cc time greater than ship time Query 5 Late Confirmation Flag SELECT additional info LIKE late confirmation Query 6 Resource Department Analysis

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structure the Response Anomaly Identification Group by case or type Hypotheses Link anomalies to potential causes SQL Queries Provide executable SQL snippets Review against constraints without any hints Drafting the Content Case 1002 1003 1004 anomalies and hypotheses

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Anomalies 1002 Sequence violation Credit check after shipment 1003 Missing activity Validate Stock Sequence violation Ship before Confirm Explicit flag late confirmation 1004 Sequence violation Payment before Invoice Shipment Missing activities Credit Check Validate Stock Hypotheses Priority orders Fast Track mode Case 1003 1004 missing checks control failure Case 1004 payment flow pre payment or data entry error Case 1003 late confirmation human error SQL Query to detect sequence violations missing activities correlate anomalies with order type find specific flags analyze payment vs invoice timing
